filename: 31.03.25- End of GeoMx and beginning of image analysis - Anniina Hanna Ada Zhihan.md

full_text:
**Agenda:**

1. **Revisit project log and creation of Github**

2. **GeoMx results follow-up**

3. **H&E annotations follow-up**

4. **Segmentation test and possibilities**

5. **GANTT steps update - planning until June**

Master file is now log-file, zhihan has created a github page already.
Zhihan has his own digital lab-book but still he will update the
log-file with his major updates.

**GeoMx**

In total 1058 AOI were collected (batch3 EyeMT) - results will arrive by
the end of April

- 260 AOI approximately

Zhihan - Update the project log with his geomx information and location
of the files

**H&E**

- Hanna - Collect all ovarian cancer samples with their histologies.

- Hanna - Report to Joonas clear instructions of what needs to be
 > corrected in the sample table

- Hanna can chat with matilda to systematize the clinical data exports

- Hanna - Update findings in the project log, and push updated scripts
 > to GitHub

- Hanna - Collect all ovarian cancer samples with their histologies.

- Hanna - Explore an algorithm to assist with annotations.

- Hanna - Validate her annotations against Ada's, selecting 10
 > uncertain samples for review with Anni.

**Segmentation**

There are problems with the segmentation, Ada will try UNMICST and check
it out.

- Ada - troubleshoot w UNMICST

- Ada - write Jerry

Timeline expected:

Anni.

**Segmentation**

There are problems with the segmentation, Ada will try UNMICST and check
it out.

- Ada - troubleshoot w UNMICST

- Ada - write Jerry

Timeline expected:

- Zhihan makes the antibody validation and arranges the folder
 > structures by Thu (3rd April)

- Ada runs the image processing pipeline unitl the segmentation and
 > checks outputs (DL 11th April)

- Full segmentation and quantification expected to be done by the 25th
 > of April

- Cylinter and gating training before Ada leaves on 9th May - Zhihan,
 > Ada and Hanna will work together.
